sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_series(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarPop(CAST(s1 || '1.0' AS Float64), y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value, 'dummy' AS s1 FROM test_series WHERE y_value IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY x_value, y_value HAVING x_value != 0;

SELECT x_value, y_value, covarPop(x_value, y_value) AS covariance FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM test_series WHERE x_value > 0) WHERE (x_value + 0.1) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY x_value, y_value HAVING covariance > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_temp(i UInt32, combined String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_temp SELECT i, CAST(x_value AS String) || ' - ' || CAST(y_value AS String) FROM test_series WHERE y_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT i, covarPop(NULLIF(x_value, -1), NULLIF(y_value, -1)) FROM test_series WHERE x_value > 0 GROUP BY i HAVING covarPop(x_value, y_value) < 2;
SELECT covarPop((SELECT AVG(x_value) FROM test_series WHERE y_value < 0), (SELECT AVG(y_value) FROM test_series WHERE x_value > 0));
